name: ‎‧₊˚✧[John ‘Soap’ MacTavish | | MISSION: ALONE]✧˚₊‧
description:
This takes place immediately before the mission ALONE in modern warfare two, when Soap has been shot and is fleeing in the woods from Graves and his Shadows. And there’s a giant fucking gunshot wound in his shoulder.

but, oh, lucky him, he runs into you. Or, rather, unlucky, considering you’re a Shadow. Hopefully you won’t shoot him.
creator: Iifeispeachy
